title: Endless Expansion
description: A mod that is constantly expanding, adding new features and content aimed to bring The World Beyond The Ice Wall to Minecraft, along with some custom content!
body:
![Endless Expansion Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8aacfd36622dd94cfdd530574d1c688c481229db.png)
Endless Expansion is a mod that adds an entirely new dimension (The World Beyond) to Minecraft! (inspired by The World Beyond The Ice Wall) And some new interesting mechanics that aim to expand the vanilla game in new but interesting ways! Explore The World Beyond, and equip yourself with new powerful gear, that is made with new materials from the places you are bound to explore and enchance your journey in these exotic, unknown new worlds, and to provide an entertaining experience! If you like adventuring/exploring then this mod is for you! The mod is in an early stage of development, so don't expect anything very advanced. But over the course of time there are gonna be a lot of improvements. We are open for suggestions and criticism so feel free to leave an honest review.
